name: architecture-visualization
description: Model, review, evolve, and maintain evidence-backed software architecture.

interface.shortDescription: Model and review evidence-backed software architecture
interface.longDescription: Use Architecture to understand current systems, flows, dependencies, runtime topology, risks, target states, and architecture health. Canvas format viewers are preserved from the original Qoder plugin for DOT, Structurizr DSL, and Mermaid artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Review architecture risks for this branch
Explain the runtime topology for this service
